title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: March 6, 2025
summary: March 6, 2025: The Arctic sea ice has experienced a relatively small increase for this week at a rate of 1.89% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 0.64%), from the level on 02/27/2025 of 13.815 M km 2 to 14.081 M km 2 for this week. Despite this increase, the sea ice extent right now is the...

title: Alaska Permanent Fund Corporation Governance Study Released
summary: The Dunleavy administration today released a report commissioned by the Governor. The study was conducted by an outside legal firm to review the Alaska Permanent Fund Corporation (APFC).
